        <div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:16px; padding:22px 26px;">
          <h4 style="font-size:16px; margin-bottom:8px;">Is Nafas a medical device?</h4>
          <p style="color:var(--muted); font-size:14.5px;">No. Nafas is a wellness and habit-support wearable. It's designed to support healthier routines alongside — not replace — medical advice or treatment.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:16px; padding:22px 26px;">
          <h4 style="font-size:16px; margin-bottom:8px;">Do I need my phone nearby?</h4>
          <p style="color:var(--muted); font-size:14.5px;">The wristband works on its own for breathing sessions and craving logging. Syncing with the app over Bluetooth keeps your stats, badges, and challenges up to date.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:16px; padding:22px 26px;">
          <h4 style="font-size:16px; margin-bottom:8px;">How long does the battery last?</h4>
          <p style="color:var(--muted); font-size:14.5px;">Up to six days on a single charge with typical daily use, including breathing sessions and continuous sensor tracking.</p>

  document.getElementById('navToggle').addEventListener('click', function(){
    document.getElementById('nav').classList.toggle('open');
  });

    a.addEventListener('click', function(){
      document.getElementById('nav').classList.remove('open');

  });
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function(){
    document.getElementById('nav').classList.remove('open');
